title: Topics
text:
Following topics will be covered in this training. The order and depth of topic may differ slightly depending on progress of participants.

Module I

Getting Started With Interpreter

Installation
Interpreters / Jupyter



Calculating With Python

Numbers
Text
Collections
Built ins



Programming Constructs

Loops
Conditions
Functions



Science and Maths

Statistics
Chaos
Riffle shuffle




Module II

Working With Files

Read/write text files
Scripts
Backup



Matter of Style

List/Dictionary comprehensions
Common iteration patterns
Make a deck and shuffle it!



Data

Tabular data
Data Cleaning
Visualizing Data



Science and Mathematics

Problems from science and mathematics




Module III

Object Oriented Programming

Classes
Time bomb - remembering state with classes



Simulations

Choose five random cards from deck
Probability of head Vs tail
Prisoner’s Dilemma



Science and Maths

Predator Prey Simulation

title: Training Notes
text: Notes of sessions will appear here.

title: Python Made Easy: Math & Science Edition
text:
Discover coding through fun experiments in science and mathematics
Traditionally programming was for computer scientists. Today’s science research is much demanding with use of computers. So programming need not be special skill of only programmers. This course will teach you python programming with some interesting computational experiments from science and maths. See topics for more details.

No prior knowledge of python expected
Complete hands on training
Portfolio building with interesting assignments
Batch of 10+1 participants
Total 12 sessions: 3 offline and 9 online
Fees Rs 15000/-
33% discount for students

Starting from 20th Sep each Saturday 10 to 12 am
For registration contact: +91 855 29 69 377 (WhatsApp)

title: Trainer
text:
Vikrant has done his M.Tech in Computational Science from Indian Institute of Science, Bangalore. He has 22 years of experience in software development. He has worked in diverse areas like Computational Fluid Dynamics, mathematical algorithms for bio-informatics, network-based license servers etc. He has worked at Strand Life Sciences, DRDO, M&M. He has given consultancy to Prayas Energy Group, S & I (Simulation & Innovation) Engineering Solutions (Sandi) for various computational and software projects.
He is also a corporate trainer for python programming. He has delivered many corporate python workshops through Pipal Academy in python programming to DRDO, Arcesium, VMware, Grofers (Blinkit) etc.
